---
title: "DAA with MAasLin 3"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
    page-layout: full
  pdf:
    keep-tex: true
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{longtable}
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

### Differential abundance analysis

```{r setup}
library(maaslin3)

# Source group-assignment
source("funct.R")

# Load the TreeSummarizedExperiment object
tse <- readRDS("../data/tse.Rds")

path_tse <- altExp(tse, "pathabundance")

variable <- "diet" 
formula_used <- "~ diet * time"
```

-   Group variable: **`r variable`**
-   Formula used: **`r formula_used`**

```{r data_prep}
# Create output directory for results
output_base_dir <- "../output/daa_maaslin3"
dir.create(output_base_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r maaslin all}
# Extract unique diets from path_tse$diet
# unique_diets <- sort(unique(path_tse$diet))
# 
# # Run Maaslin3 for each diet and save results
# results <- lapply(unique_diets, function(diet) {
#   # Subset path_tse for the current diet
#   diet_tse <- path_tse[, path_tse$diet == diet]
#   
#   # Define the output directory for the current diet
#   diet_output_dir <- file.path(output_base_dir, paste0("diet_", diet))
#   dir.create(diet_output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
#   
  # Run Maaslin3
  fit_out <- maaslin3(
    path_tse,
    output = output_base_dir,
    formula = '~ diet * time',
    normalization = 'TSS',
    transform = 'LOG',
    augment = TRUE,
    standardize = TRUE,
    max_significance = 0.1,
    median_comparison_abundance = TRUE,
    median_comparison_prevalence = FALSE,
    max_pngs = 100,
    cores = 1,
    save_models = TRUE,
    verbosity = "WARN"
  )
# })
```

```{r print results}
png_files <- list.files(output_base_dir, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
```

![summary_plot.png](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/summary_plot.png){alt="summary_plot.png"} ![diet_ANAGLYCOLYSIS.PWY..glycolysis.III..from.glucose.\_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_ANAGLYCOLYSIS.PWY..glycolysis.III..from.glucose._linear.png) ![diet_ARG.POLYAMINE.SYN..superpathway.of.arginine.and.polyamine.biosynthesis_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_ARG.POLYAMINE.SYN..superpathway.of.arginine.and.polyamine.biosynthesis_linear.png) ![diet_ARO.PWY..chorismate.biosynthesis.I_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_ARO.PWY..chorismate.biosynthesis.I_linear.png) ![diet_BRANCHED.CHAIN.AA.SYN.PWY..superpathway.of.branched.chain.amino.acid.biosynthesis_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_BRANCHED.CHAIN.AA.SYN.PWY..superpathway.of.branched.chain.amino.acid.biosynthesis_linear.png) ![diet_CALVIN.PWY..Calvin.Benson.Bassham.cycle_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_CALVIN.PWY..Calvin.Benson.Bassham.cycle_linear.png) ![diet_COA.PWY..coenzyme.A.biosynthesis.I..prokaryotic.\_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_COA.PWY..coenzyme.A.biosynthesis.I..prokaryotic._linear.png) ![diet_COA.PWY.1..superpathway.of.coenzyme.A.biosynthesis.III..mammals.\_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_COA.PWY.1..superpathway.of.coenzyme.A.biosynthesis.III..mammals._linear.png) ![diet_COLANSYN.PWY..colanic.acid.building.blocks.biosynthesis_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_COLANSYN.PWY..colanic.acid.building.blocks.biosynthesis_linear.png) ![diet_COMPLETE.ARO.PWY..superpathway.of.aromatic.amino.acid.biosynthesis_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_COMPLETE.ARO.PWY..superpathway.of.aromatic.amino.acid.biosynthesis_linear.png) ![diet_DTDPRHAMSYN.PWY..dTDP..beta..L.rhamnose.biosynthesis_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_DTDPRHAMSYN.PWY..dTDP..beta..L.rhamnose.biosynthesis_linear.png) ![diet_GLUCARDEG.PWY..D.glucarate.degradation.I_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_GLUCARDEG.PWY..D.glucarate.degradation.I_linear.png) ![diet_HISTSYN.PWY..L.histidine.biosynthesis_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_HISTSYN.PWY..L.histidine.biosynthesis_linear.png) ![diet_ILEUSYN.PWY..L.isoleucine.biosynthesis.I..from.threonine.\_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_ILEUSYN.PWY..L.isoleucine.biosynthesis.I..from.threonine._linear.png) ![diet_NONMEVIPP.PWY..methylerythritol.phosphate.pathway.I_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_NONMEVIPP.PWY..methylerythritol.phosphate.pathway.I_linear.png) ![diet_OANTIGEN.PWY..O.antigen.building.blocks.biosynthesis..E..coli.\_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_OANTIGEN.PWY..O.antigen.building.blocks.biosynthesis..E..coli._linear.png) ![diet_PANTO.PWY..phosphopantothenate.biosynthesis.I.g\_\_Alistipes.s\_\_Alistipes_finegoldii_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PANTO.PWY..phosphopantothenate.biosynthesis.I.g__Alistipes.s__Alistipes_finegoldii_linear.png) ![diet_PEPTIDOGLYCANSYN.PWY..peptidoglycan.biosynthesis.I..meso.diaminopimelate.containing.\_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PEPTIDOGLYCANSYN.PWY..peptidoglycan.biosynthesis.I..meso.diaminopimelate.containing._linear.png) ![diet_PWY.1042..glycolysis.IV_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.1042..glycolysis.IV_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.2942..L.lysine.biosynthesis.III_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.2942..L.lysine.biosynthesis.III_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.3001..superpathway.of.L.isoleucine.biosynthesis.I_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.3001..superpathway.of.L.isoleucine.biosynthesis.I_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.3001..superpathway.of.L.isoleucine.biosynthesis.I.g\_\_Blautia.s\_\_Ruminococcus_torques_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.3001..superpathway.of.L.isoleucine.biosynthesis.I.g__Blautia.s__Ruminococcus_torques_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.3841..folate.transformations.II..plants.\_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.3841..folate.transformations.II..plants._linear.png) ![diet_PWY.5097..L.lysine.biosynthesis.VI_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.5097..L.lysine.biosynthesis.VI_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.5097..L.lysine.biosynthesis.VI.g\_\_Blautia.s\_\_Ruminococcus_torques_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.5097..L.lysine.biosynthesis.VI.g__Blautia.s__Ruminococcus_torques_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.5103..L.isoleucine.biosynthesis.III_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.5103..L.isoleucine.biosynthesis.III_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.5130..2.oxobutanoate.degradation.I.unclassified_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.5130..2.oxobutanoate.degradation.I.unclassified_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.5686..UMP.biosynthesis.I_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.5686..UMP.biosynthesis.I_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.5941..glycogen.degradation.II.g\_\_Blautia.s\_\_Ruminococcus_torques_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.5941..glycogen.degradation.II.g__Blautia.s__Ruminococcus_torques_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.6121..5.aminoimidazole.ribonucleotide.biosynthesis.I_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.6121..5.aminoimidazole.ribonucleotide.biosynthesis.I_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.6122..5.aminoimidazole.ribonucleotide.biosynthesis.II_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.6122..5.aminoimidazole.ribonucleotide.biosynthesis.II_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.6123..inosine.5..phosphate.biosynthesis.I_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.6123..inosine.5..phosphate.biosynthesis.I_linear.png) ![diet_PWY.6124..inosine.5..phosphate.biosynthesis.II_linear](../output/daa_maaslin3/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_PWY.6124..inosine.5..phosphate.biosynthesis.II_linear.png)
